name: vip-pharmacy-crm-backend
description: Backend API for VIP CRM - Pharmaceutical Field Sales Management

scripts.startup:check: node -e "const req=['MONGO_URI','JWT_SECRET','JWT_REFRESH_SECRET'];const miss=req.filter(k=>!(process.env[k]||'').trim());if(miss.length){console.error('Missing required environment variables:',miss.join(', '));process.exit(1);}if((process.env.JWT_SECRET||'').length<64){console.error('SECURITY ERROR: JWT_SECRET must be at least 64 characters.');process.exit(1);}if((process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET||'').length<64){console.error('SECURITY ERROR: JWT_REFRESH_SECRET must be at least 64 characters.');process.exit(1);}if(process.env.NODE_ENV==='production'&&!(process.env.CORS_ORIGINS||'').trim()){console.error('SECURITY ERROR: CORS_ORIGINS is required in production.');process.exit(1);}console.log('Startup check passed.');"
